inputs.description: Synthetic consulting-discovery packet with documents, transcripts, financials, and benchmark notes.

payload.engagement_goal: Find board-ready cost, growth, risk, and technology opportunities for the next 12 months.

documents.name: annual_report_excerpt.md
documents.text:
# Annual Report Excerpt
Revenue grew 4 percent while SG&A rose 11 percent. Management cited fragmented demand planning, manual quote approvals, and elevated cloud spend as margin headwinds.

documents.name: operations_policy.md
documents.text:
# Operations Policy
Plant managers own local scheduling. Exceptions require regional VP approval. Teams maintain separate spreadsheets for maintenance backlog, supplier delays, and workforce availability.

documents.name: technology_assessment.md
documents.text:
# Technology Assessment
ERP data quality is uneven. Cloud tagging is incomplete. Field service teams use four workflow tools and lack a single owner for automation standards.

meeting_transcripts:
Alex: Finance wants a clearer path to reduce SG&A without hurting service.
Priya: Decision: focus first on quote automation and cloud cost governance.
Mina will gather owner-level process maps by Friday.
Action item: validate savings assumptions with operations.
payload.financials_csv:
metric,baseline,target
SG&A growth,11,6
Quote cycle days,9,4
Cloud waste percent,18,7
Maintenance backlog days,21,12

claims: Industrial peers use shared services to reduce SG&A growth
Quote automation improves cycle time and win-rate consistency
Cloud cost governance is a near-term margin lever

llm.agent_role: Strategy discovery and board recommendation agent

metadata.customizable_for: Enterprise strategy, private-equity value creation, CFO transformation, corporate development, and transformation-office discovery.
metadata.problem_solved: Companies spend weeks collecting documents, interviewing teams, summarizing findings, and building first-draft strategy recommendations.
metadata.target_users: Large enterprise strategy, CFO, corporate development, private-equity operating, and transformation-office teams.

outputs.artifact_contract: Board-ready recommendation packet with summary, issue tree, opportunity map, roadmap, slide outline, and evidence appendix.

inline_json.description: Load overrides from an inline JSON object.

input_file.description: Load JSON overrides from a local file path.
